company.name: Obsidian Capital
company.about: Obsidian Capital is a quantitative trading firm, leveraging algorithms and low-latency technologies to provide liquidity in financial markets. Our team develops and implements advanced trading strategies that quickly respond to market dynamics. We strategically deploy proprietary capital for active trading, utilizing quantitative models to generate consistent returns.

address.streetAddress: 605, Hetdiv Square, Sindhu Bhavan Road, Bodakdev

jobs.title: Software Developer
overview: We are hiring a Software Developer to build and maintain the systems our traders and quantitative researchers use every day. You will write performance-critical code in C++ and Python, and own features end-to-end from design to production.
This is a hands-on role on a small team — the code you ship moves P&L the next trading day, not the next quarter.
responsibilities: Design, develop, test, and maintain components of our trading and research platform
Write low-latency, high-throughput code in C++ and Python
Build internal tools and infrastructure used directly by traders and quantitative researchers
Diagnose and resolve issues in live production trading systems
Profile, benchmark, and optimize hot paths in production code
Collaborate with traders, researchers, and other engineers on project delivery
requiredQualifications: 3–5 years of professional experience building production software systems
Strong proficiency in C++ and Python
Hands-on experience with multithreading and multiprocessing
Solid grasp of data structures, algorithms, and software design patterns
Genuine interest in financial markets and algorithmic trading
preferredQualifications: Experience building latency-sensitive or systems-level applications
Exposure to network programming, sockets, or kernel-bypass stacks
Prior work in quantitative finance, trading, or market data systems
offer: Compensation: INR 24–36 LPA, based on experience
Direct ownership of high-impact work in a small, focused team
Exposure to the full stack of a proprietary trading business — research, execution, risk, infrastructure
Collaborative work environment alongside traders, researchers, and engineers
